chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 2054 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1.For order on MA No. 11175/25 (urgent) 2.For order on MA No. 11176/25 (exemption) 3.For hearing of bail application 07.08.2025 Mr. Hadi Bux, Advocate a/w Applicants ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all exceptions. 3. Applicants namely Sultan Ahmed son of Muhammad Ismail Channa, Meer Hassan son of Mehar Ali Channa, Naved Ali son of Mehar Ali Channa, Dileer Ali son of Ghulam Muhammad Channa and Ghulam Qasim son of Abdul Hakeem, are present along with their Counsel to seek protective bail to enable them to appear before the Trial Court for seeking appropriate relief. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicants are innocent and have been falsely implicated by complainant in Crime No. 73/2025 of PS Sobhodero, Khairpur Mirs, under Section 302, 324, 114, 337A(i), F(i), 147, 148 PPC and police has shaken hands with complainant party and it is made difficult for applicant to approach the concerned Court for getting appropriate relief as such he has appeared before this Court for seeking protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, applicants are granted protective bail for 10 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 10 days from today or the date on which the applicants will surrender before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The protective bail application is disposed of.

This protective bail shall remain in force for 10 days from today or the date on which the applicants will surrender before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The protective bail application is disposed of. J U D G E Ashraf
